name: correction_textual_note

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.14 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] ［＃「X」は底本では「Y」］ is the source-text divergence note: the displayed text X appears as Y in the底本 (source book). It annotates without transforming — the node carries the raw directive (hidden aozora-annotation span) with the AnnotationKind::TextualNote classification (pandoc/wire map `textual-note`). ~7k occurrences, the corpus' most common editorial note. Offsets from the §3 byte model; not read back from a processor.

source: 間違い［＃「間違い」は底本では「間違ひ」］です

expected.html: 間違い［＃「間違い」は底本では「間違ひ」］です
expected.serialize: 間違い［＃「間違い」は底本では「間違ひ」］です
